title: Just-In LOL(weapons)
description: The weapons in League of Legends
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6307b57d2f345783a33d792896fd9e9f031f06a.png)

I've added equipment and champion's weapons from League of Legends into Minecraft, retaining their original passive mechanics with some Minecraft-style adjustments.

![weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/371b868b9a2d423e8a712eb61ca5409c4ccf2be1.png)
![WEAPONS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fe4091eed728ab27bb85f2fa67d68db8ac44658.png)

For now the new weapons are only apply on creative mode,but if you load with [https://modrinth.com/mod/just-in-combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-in-combat) ,You'll have chance to get the weapons by kill the mobs equip with them.
